category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Header Dictionary Triples as an RDF compression format; official RDF HDT site describes HDT for compressed RDF with search and browse operations.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide hdt.
docs_sources: Official RDF HDT site provides the HDT overview and C++ library manual for hdt-cpp.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/rdfhdt/hdt-cpp, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names RDF and HDT compression; source_facts.executables lists rdf2hdt, hdtSearch, and hdtInfo.
